AD_COLUMN.NAME: EM_Spquly_Takenumber
AD_COLUMN.DEFAULTVALUE: @SQL=SELECT COALESCE(MAX(EM_Spquly_Takenumber),(SELECT COALESCE(EM_Spquly_Takes,0) FROM MA_Measure_Shift WHERE MA_Measure_Shift_ID=(SELECT DISTINCT MA_Measure_Shift_ID FROM MA_Measure_Group WHERE MA_Measure_Group_ID=@MA_Measure_Group_ID@))) AS DefaultValue FROM MA_Measure_Time WHERE MA_Measure_Group_ID=@MA_Measure_Group_ID@
